name: Forms & records
desc: Filled-in forms, checkboxes, a shipping label and a stamped memo. Tests what a reader sees, not just the words.

rows.label: Form - employment application
rows.question: This is a scanned form or record. Extract these fields exactly as printed: Applicant name; Position applied for; Phone; Most recent employer. Answer with one line per field in the form "Field name: value". If a field is not on the document, write "not found".
rows.ocr:

July 6,2026

Available to start immediately:Yes
Signature: D. Whitfield

rows.parse:
INTERNAL MEMO

To  **All department heads**

From  **M. Adeyemi, Operations**

Date  **May 22, 2026**

Subject  **Vendor consolidation plan**

Following the Q1 review, procurement will consolidate our hardware vendors from nine suppliers to four by the end of Q3. Framework agreements are being finalized with the remaining suppliers now.

Department heads should submit any sole-source exceptions to procurement by June 15, 2026. Orders placed after July 1 must use the new vendor list in the purchasing portal.

Distribution: operations, finance, facilities
